TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == CencuŤóŹśóŹ == Cencu tada sakaudip nuhein itida i Cincen buyuan, u Cenyi a kamu nu binacadan, saan tu kunuheni " puopa" Cenyi ŗĹĖŗĹľŗĹĎŗľčŗĹĒŗľč, sumaden nu Wili misulit " bod pa, aasipen nu Cenyi P√∂ba. tadaangangan nika kenihan itida i Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo atu labutu nu kanatalan a Sicen, Cun, Cin, Kan, Din, kanatalay a tademaw makaala tu nemlisep a wangan ku tademaw, itida i Nipuoe, Intu', Pudan, Pacise-tan sa i liwliw nu Cincen buyuan a kanatalan idaw nikakenihan tu tademaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka Cunkuo kanatalan mabulaway nu Cencu atu iluc makaala tu tusep a wangan, u ihekalay a Cen-zen han. . pitu a seci, Suncen-kanpu palecaden tu Cincen buyuan, patideng tu Tulu-dikuo. kunyun caycay , caytu a seci, hamawsa malingatu ku Cencu a binacadan. Cencu nakamuan u Cenyi, milecad tu Cenwen. angangan nu kakawawan u sapahutin tu katala, sakayliwmah. Palutatengaan nuheni a lisin u mipaypaya, micidek ku sasinzaan nuheni. 7šłĖÁīÄ, . daduducan tu dikuc u Cencu a dikucan, u tengliw ku tatengaay. u tunuc ku kakanen, katalan atu sidi ku yadahay a nikanan, manamuh minanum tu suyuca, cinkuociw. papahutinan u dabek ku yadah, patiyamay han u nipatunduhan tu ba'tu ku luma'. pasayda han i tapukuwan ku tadem. pisiwgacuan u tada kanamuhan nu Cencu a demiadan. matenesay t uku lalangw nuheni, micidek ku balubaluan nu melitmelit, yadah ku nipaini nu taw, sasapayuen nu Cencu, kuyumi nu heni, lalalukiyawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tademaw nisangaan uyda ku picidekan. Sese, zekun nalimaan, papalawan caay kaw tatengaay a lalangawan nu laliwanan a nikilukan. . nananaman a sasalisinanťĘ®šŅóÁŅíśÖ£ kakikunganŚ©öŚßĽ yadah ku wayway nu nipikikungan. Hanaadih kita tu cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna anikaleacawaan, itida i mawmahay nu niyadu'an atu nika lamelan tu dumaan a tademawan nu niyadu'an makaala tu siwlim a lasubuan. Sakaadihan numita u mikadabu ku tataynaan tu tatamaan. anu inai'ay nu tatamaan a wawaan taneng mikadabu tu tataynaan. . katuuday nu tatamaan a acawa nu lumaan, sipakayda i tatamaan a malekakaay ku acawaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaay a tatamaan, kilul sat uku sabama milabu tida lumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaay a kakaan ku wama han, saba hantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaay a malekakaay nu tatamaan cacay ku tataynaan a acawaw mihniay hina adih kita. Dumasa idaw ku calekakaan nu tatamaan tu acawawan atu cabay milabutu kasiacawa. . Cencu nikaleacawaan amisawantan tu putun nu idangan atu lalabu nu lumaan a mikikung, malecaday ku wama han acaay kaleacawaw, nu calekakaan acaay tu kaleacawaw. caysiw-walcay mihcaan, midui tu ku Sicen itidaay a dayhu tu Cunha-zenmin kunhekuo a kikungan nu hulic, saan ku hulic " lawpesentu ku cacaya nu yadahay a tataynaan a acawaw, cacaya a tatamaan a acawawan, nu malaacawaay tu a waywayan, anu caay lawpesi nida ku taleacawaaan, hidan tu sa. 1981ŚĻī, ". kanki nu binacadanśįĎśóŹťóúšŅā Cencu atu Cunyun hancu idaw ku sasupaini nuheni tu matenesay a lalangawan. Suncen-kapu zitay, Tencaw atu Tuhun malalitemuh tu Cenan Sinin Tankula pungkangan Naci Lasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu Cenhan kapahtu ku nikasasungaayan nu heni atu lalangawan, Hancu a tawce, secuo, insua a nalimaan taydatu i Centi, Cencu pasayda i Hahti idaw tu ku yadahay nu cacacudadan. Cencu milakuuyd tu Cencu nipiduducan tu sapipaypaya a lisinan, ni kuwanan a liwliw nu binacadan a niyadu'an mapalalit, Yuncaw zitay a mikikakaay nu Mumku binacadan, mikikakaay tu Cincaw a Mancu, mikikaka tu Licen niyadu'an a Nasicu, miduduc tu sapalutatengaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, lisin, lalangawan caay namin kalacad ku nipaini tu sakatineng. . Cencu atu Cincen kawyun a Menpa binacadan, Lupa binacadan, Siaepa-zen a binacadan hatidaaytu nu tenes mapulung maudip, caay ka putun ku kalecabay nuheni. ci enem se ci Dalaycen-yinciacuo itidaay a nilecuhan i Menuo a Menpa a binacadan. Cencu u sapikiluk tu Cenyi a sulit nu Cenwen, alaen nu Pu'dan, Sicin a tademaw sipikiluk nuheni tu kamu. . itida i Kancincun- dencen kalalitemuhan a Cenli saliningan, idaw ku nikakenihan a malaliday nu Cencu a binacadan, u Cenyi nami ku sakamuen, itini i labu musakamuay tu kamuan, mahida u Ciazen-zen, Muya-zen sa, caaya kaw kakatenengananay a binacada, palu Cencu han namin nu Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo kina binacadan. .
S.PHON: == ¶…ôn ¶u** == ¶…ôn ¶u tada sakaudip nuńß…ôin itida i ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan, u ¶…ônji a kamu nu bina ¶adan, saan tu kunuńß…ôni " puopa" ¶…ônji ******, sumad…ôn nu wir~…ĺi misur~…ĺit " bod pa, aasip…ôn nu ¶…ônji p*ba. tadaaŇčaŇčan nika k…ônińßan itida i ¶unńßa-minkuo kunńß…ôkuo atu r~…ĺabutu nu kanatar~…ĺan a si ¶…ôn, ¶un, ¶in, kan, din, kanatar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu n…ômr~…ĺis…ôp a waŇčan ku tad…ômaw, itida i nipuo…ô, intu Ē~ °, pudan, pa ¶is…ô-tan sa i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan a kanatar~…ĺan idaw nikak…ônińßan tu tad…ômaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka ¶unkuo kanatar~…ĺan mabur~…ĺawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶u atu ir~…ĺu ¶ makaar~…ĺa tu tus…ôp a waŇčan, u ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a ¶…ôn-z…ôn ńßan. . pitu a s…ô ¶i, sun ¶…ôn-kanpu par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn tu ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan, patid…ôŇč tu tur~…ĺu-dikuo. kunjun ¶aj ¶aj , ¶ajtu a s…ô ¶i, ńßamawsa mar~…ĺiŇčatu ku ¶…ôn ¶u a bina ¶adan. ¶…ôn ¶u nakamuan u ¶…ônji, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶…ônw…ôn. aŇčaŇčan nu kakawawan u sapańßutin tu katar~…ĺa, sakajr~…ĺiwmańß. par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nuńß…ôni a r~…ĺisin u mipajpaja, mi ¶id…ôk ku sasinzaan nuńß…ôni. ***, . dadudu ¶an tu diku ¶ u ¶…ôn ¶u a diku ¶an, u t…ôŇčr~…ĺiw ku tat…ôŇčaaj. u tunu ¶ ku kakan…ôn, katar~…ĺan atu sidi ku jadańßaj a nikanan, manamuńß minanum tu suju ¶a, ¶inkuo ¶iw. papańßutinan u dab…ôk ku jadańß, patijamaj ńßan u nipatunduńßan tu ba Ē~ °tu ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pasajda ńßan i tapukuwan ku tad…ôm. pisiwga ¶uan u tada kanamuńßan nu ¶…ôn ¶u a d…ômiadan. mat…ôn…ôsaj t uku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčw nuńß…ôni, mi ¶id…ôk ku bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan nu m…ôr~…ĺitm…ôr~…ĺit, jadańß ku nipaini nu taw, sasapaju…ôn nu ¶…ôn ¶u, kujumi nu ńß…ôni, r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺukijawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tad…ômaw nisaŇčaan ujda ku pi ¶id…ôkan. s…ôs…ô, z…ôkun nar~…ĺimaan, papar~…ĺawan ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwanan a nikir~…ĺukan. . nananaman a sasar~…ĺisinan**** kakikuŇčan** jadańß ku wajwaj nu nipikikuŇčan. ńßanaadińß kita tu ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna anikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan, itida i mawmańßaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an atu nika r~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan tu dumaan a tad…ômawan nu nijadu Ē~ °an makaar~…ĺa tu siwr~…ĺim a r~…ĺasubuan. sakaadińßan numita u mikadabu ku tatajnaan tu tatamaan. anu inai Ē~ °aj nu tatamaan a wawaan tan…ôŇč mikadabu tu tatajnaan. . katuudaj nu tatamaan a a ¶awa nu r~…ĺumaan, sipakajda i tatamaan a mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj ku a ¶awaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaaj a tatamaan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sat uku sabama mir~…ĺabu tida r~…ĺumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaaj a kakaan ku wama ńßan, saba ńßantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj nu tatamaan ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan a a ¶awaw mińßniaj ńßina adińß kita. dumasa idaw ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nu tatamaan tu a ¶awawan atu ¶abaj mir~…ĺabutu kasia ¶awa. . ¶…ôn ¶u nikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan amisawantan tu putun nu idaŇčan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺumaan a mikikuŇč, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku wama ńßan a ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaw, nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan a ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaw. ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺ ¶aj mińß ¶aan, midui tu ku si ¶…ôn itidaaj a dajńßu tu ¶unńßa-z…ônmin kunńß…ôkuo a kikuŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, saan ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ " r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôntu ku ¶a ¶aja nu jadańßaj a tatajnaan a a ¶awaw, ¶a ¶aja a tatamaan a a ¶awawan, nu mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj tu a wajwajan, anu ¶aaj r~…ĺawp…ôsi nida ku tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaaan, ńßidan tu sa. *****, ". kanki nu bina ¶adan**** ¶…ôn ¶u atu ¶unjun ńßan ¶u idaw ku sasupaini nuńß…ôni tu mat…ôn…ôsaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sun ¶…ôn-kapu zitaj, t…ôn ¶aw atu tuńßun mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß tu ¶…ônan sinin tankur~…ĺa puŇčkaŇčan na ¶i r~…ĺasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu ¶…ônńßan kapańßtu ku nikasasuŇčaajan nu ńß…ôni atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ńßan ¶u a taw ¶…ô, s…ô ¶uo, insua a nar~…ĺimaan tajdatu i ¶…ônti, ¶…ôn ¶u pasajda i ńßańßti idaw tu ku jadańßaj nu ¶a ¶a ¶udadan. ¶…ôn ¶u mir~…ĺakuujd tu ¶…ôn ¶u nipidudu ¶an tu sapipajpaja a r~…ĺisinan, ni kuwanan a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu bina ¶adan a nijadu Ē~ °an mapar~…ĺar~…ĺit, jun ¶aw zitaj a mikikakaaj nu mumku bina ¶adan, mikikakaaj tu ¶in ¶aw a man ¶u, mikikaka tu r~…ĺi ¶…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an a nasi ¶u, midudu ¶ tu sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, r~…ĺisin, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺa ¶ad ku nipaini tu sakatin…ôŇč. . ¶…ôn ¶u atu ¶in ¶…ôn kawjun a m…ônpa bina ¶adan, r~…ĺupa bina ¶adan, sia…ôpa-z…ôn a bina ¶adan ńßatidaajtu nu t…ôn…ôs mapur~…ĺuŇč maudip, ¶aaj ka putun ku kar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj nuńß…ôni. ¶i …ôn…ôm s…ô ¶i dar~…ĺaj ¶…ôn-jin ¶ia ¶uo itidaaj a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i m…ônuo a m…ônpa a bina ¶adan. ¶…ôn ¶u u sapikir~…ĺuk tu ¶…ônji a sur~…ĺit nu ¶…ônw…ôn, ar~…ĺa…ôn nu pu Ē~ °dan, si ¶in a tad…ômaw sipikir~…ĺuk nuńß…ôni tu kamu. . itida i kan ¶in ¶un- d…ôn ¶…ôn kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a ¶…ônr~…ĺi sar~…ĺiniŇčan, idaw ku nikak…ônińßan a mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu ¶…ôn ¶u a bina ¶adan, u ¶…ônji nami ku sakamu…ôn, itini i r~…ĺabu musakamuaj tu kamuan, mańßida u ¶iaz…ôn-z…ôn, muja-z…ôn sa, ¶aaja kaw kakat…ôn…ôŇčananaj a bina ¶ada, par~…ĺu ¶…ôn ¶u ńßan namin nu ¶unńßa-minkuo kunńß…ôkuo kina bina ¶adan. .
S.FORM: == CencuŤóŹśóŹ == Cencu tada sakaudip nuhein itida i Cincen buyuan, u Cenyi a kamu nu binacadan, saan tu kunuheni " puopa" Cenyi ŗĹĖŗĹľŗĹĎŗľčŗĹĒŗľč, sumaden nu Wili misulit " bod pa, aasipen nu Cenyi P√∂ba. tadaangangan nika kenihan itida i Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo atu labutu nu kanatalan a Sicen, Cun, Cin, Kan, Din, kanatalay a tademaw makaala tu nemlisep a wangan ku tademaw, itida i Nipuoe, Intu', Pudan, Pacise-tan sa i liwliw nu Cincen buyuan a kanatalan idaw nikakenihan tu tademaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka Cunkuo kanatalan mabulaway nu Cencu atu iluc makaala tu tusep a wangan, u ihekalay a Cen-zen han. . pitu a seci, Suncen-kanpu palecaden tu Cincen buyuan, patideng tu Tulu-dikuo. kunyun caycay , caytu a seci, hamawsa malingatu ku Cencu a binacadan. Cencu nakamuan u Cenyi, milecad tu Cenwen. angangan nu kakawawan u sapahutin tu katala, sakayliwmah. Palutatengaan nuheni a lisin u mipaypaya, micidek ku sasinzaan nuheni. 7šłĖÁīÄ, . daduducan tu dikuc u Cencu a dikucan, u tengliw ku tatengaay. u tunuc ku kakanen, katalan atu sidi ku yadahay a nikanan, manamuh minanum tu suyuca, cinkuociw. papahutinan u dabek ku yadah, patiyamay han u nipatunduhan tu ba'tu ku luma'. pasayda han i tapukuwan ku tadem. pisiwgacuan u tada kanamuhan nu Cencu a demiadan. matenesay t uku lalangw nuheni, micidek ku balubaluan nu melitmelit, yadah ku nipaini nu taw, sasapayuen nu Cencu, kuyumi nu heni, lalalukiyawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tademaw nisangaan uyda ku picidekan. Sese, zekun nalimaan, papalawan caay kaw tatengaay a lalangawan nu laliwanan a nikilukan. . nananaman a sasalisinanťĘ®šŅóÁŅíśÖ£ kakikunganŚ©öŚßĽ yadah ku wayway nu nipikikungan. Hanaadih kita tu cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna anikaleacawaan, itida i mawmahay nu niyadu'an atu nika lamelan tu dumaan a tademawan nu niyadu'an makaala tu siwlim a lasubuan. Sakaadihan numita u mikadabu ku tataynaan tu tatamaan. anu inai'ay nu tatamaan a wawaan taneng mikadabu tu tataynaan. . katuuday nu tatamaan a acawa nu lumaan, sipakayda i tatamaan a malekakaay ku acawaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaay a tatamaan, kilul sat uku sabama milabu tida lumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaay a kakaan ku wama han, saba hantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaay a malekakaay nu tatamaan cacay ku tataynaan a acawaw mihniay hina adih kita. Dumasa idaw ku calekakaan nu tatamaan tu acawawan atu cabay milabutu kasiacawa. . Cencu nikaleacawaan amisawantan tu putun nu idangan atu lalabu nu lumaan a mikikung, malecaday ku wama han acaay kaleacawaw, nu calekakaan acaay tu kaleacawaw. caysiw-walcay mihcaan, midui tu ku Sicen itidaay a dayhu tu Cunha-zenmin kunhekuo a kikungan nu hulic, saan ku hulic " lawpesentu ku cacaya nu yadahay a tataynaan a acawaw, cacaya a tatamaan a acawawan, nu malaacawaay tu a waywayan, anu caay lawpesi nida ku taleacawaaan, hidan tu sa. 1981ŚĻī, ". kanki nu binacadanśįĎśóŹťóúšŅā Cencu atu Cunyun hancu idaw ku sasupaini nuheni tu matenesay a lalangawan. Suncen-kapu zitay, Tencaw atu Tuhun malalitemuh tu Cenan Sinin Tankula pungkangan Naci Lasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu Cenhan kapahtu ku nikasasungaayan nu heni atu lalangawan, Hancu a tawce, secuo, insua a nalimaan taydatu i Centi, Cencu pasayda i Hahti idaw tu ku yadahay nu cacacudadan. Cencu milakuuyd tu Cencu nipiduducan tu sapipaypaya a lisinan, ni kuwanan a liwliw nu binacadan a niyadu'an mapalalit, Yuncaw zitay a mikikakaay nu Mumku binacadan, mikikakaay tu Cincaw a Mancu, mikikaka tu Licen niyadu'an a Nasicu, miduduc tu sapalutatengaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, lisin, lalangawan caay namin kalacad ku nipaini tu sakatineng. . Cencu atu Cincen kawyun a Menpa binacadan, Lupa binacadan, Siaepa-zen a binacadan hatidaaytu nu tenes mapulung maudip, caay ka putun ku kalecabay nuheni. ci enem se ci Dalaycen-yinciacuo itidaay a nilecuhan i Menuo a Menpa a binacadan. Cencu u sapikiluk tu Cenyi a sulit nu Cenwen, alaen nu Pu'dan, Sicin a tademaw sipikiluk nuheni tu kamu. . itida i Kancincun- dencen kalalitemuhan a Cenli saliningan, idaw ku nikakenihan a malaliday nu Cencu a binacadan, u Cenyi nami ku sakamuen, itini i labu musakamuay tu kamuan, mahida u Ciazen-zen, Muya-zen sa, caaya kaw kakatenengananay a binacada, palu Cencu han namin nu Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo kina binacadan. .

kunjun ¶aj ¶aj , ¶ajtu a s…ô ¶i, ńßamawsa mar~…ĺiŇčatu ku ¶…ôn ¶u a bina ¶adan. ¶…ôn ¶u nakamuan u ¶…ônji, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶…ônw…ôn. aŇčaŇčan nu kakawawan u sapańßutin tu katar~…ĺa, sakajr~…ĺiwmańß. par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nuńß…ôni a r~…ĺisin u mipajpaja, mi ¶id…ôk ku sasinzaan nuńß…ôni. ***, . dadudu ¶an tu diku ¶ u ¶…ôn ¶u a diku ¶an, u t…ôŇčr~…ĺiw ku tat…ôŇčaaj. u tunu ¶ ku kakan…ôn, katar~…ĺan atu sidi ku jadańßaj a nikanan, manamuńß minanum tu suju ¶a, ¶inkuo ¶iw. papańßutinan u dab…ôk ku jadańß, patijamaj ńßan u nipatunduńßan tu ba Ē~ °tu ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pasajda ńßan i tapukuwan ku tad…ôm. pisiwga ¶uan u tada kanamuńßan nu ¶…ôn ¶u a d…ômiadan. mat…ôn…ôsaj t uku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčw nuńß…ôni, mi ¶id…ôk ku bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan nu m…ôr~…ĺitm…ôr~…ĺit, jadańß ku nipaini nu taw, sasapaju…ôn nu ¶…ôn ¶u, kujumi nu ńß…ôni, r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺukijawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tad…ômaw nisaŇčaan ujda ku pi ¶id…ôkan. s…ôs…ô, z…ôkun nar~…ĺimaan, papar~…ĺawan ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwanan a nikir~…ĺukan. . nananaman a sasar~…ĺisinan**** kakikuŇčan** jadańß ku wajwaj nu nipikikuŇčan. ńßanaadińß kita tu ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna anikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan, itida i mawmańßaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an atu nika r~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan tu dumaan a tad…ômawan nu nijadu Ē~ °an makaar~…ĺa tu siwr~…ĺim a r~…ĺasubuan. sakaadińßan numita u mikadabu ku tatajnaan tu tatamaan. anu inai Ē~
